name: Vectis
description: A classic Tenno sniper rifle, the Vectis is ideal for ranged takedowns.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: A classic Tenno sniper rifle, the Vectis is ideal for ranged takedowns.

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Neurodes
components.description:
Biotech sensor organ harvested from Infested entities.

Location: Earth, Lua, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed weapons with 1 bullet in their magazine (such as Vectis and Exergis) bypassing the Fire Rate limit if equipped with a max rank Arcane Pistoleer.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Prime Vault 26.0.8 + 26.0.8.1
patchlogs.changes: Replaced the Lith V7 Forma Blueprint reward with the Vectis Prime Barrel to address missing Vectis piece.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed receiving an error when attempting to purchase the Vectis Silferer Skin.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.14.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed players being able to hear Vectis/Vectis Prime zoom in/zoom out sounds from other players' weapon.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.0.6 + 22.0.6.1
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the headshot damage of the Vulkar series, Snipetron series and Vectis series in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Update 21.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a functionality loss when firing a scoped Vectis in Captura while using a controller.

patchlogs.name: Recurring Dreams + Hotfix 1
patchlogs.changes: Rubico, Snipetron series and Vectis series Headshot multiplier returned to their intended 2x multiplier in Conclave

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Increased damage of Vectis in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: Update 1
patchlogs.changes: Removed a delay intended to fix frame rate when auto reloading a weapon. This primarily affected the Vectis and Tigris due to frequent reloading.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: U1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Vectis Tekelus skin not being rewarded on purchase and instead giving another Skin.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Update 1
patchlogs.changes: Conclave mod 'Emergent Aftermath' can no longer be used with the Vectis sniper rifle.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Hotfix 13
patchlogs.changes: The Vectis has received the PBR treatment!

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Vectis Prime not displaying any hit FX.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.10 & Tactial Alert: Divine Will
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage of all Sniper Rifles apart from Vectis which increased, in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.3
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Vectis skins not properly coloring the clip on the Vectis Prime.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.6.1
patchlogs.changes: Increased the damage of the Vectis Prime in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Vectis being able to reach 0 clip size from the Depleted Reload.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: Vectis series headshot multiplier increased to 3x and their damage reduced in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.11: Ash Prime + Hotfix 16.11.1
patchlogs.changes: Vectis and Vectis Prime are now available for use in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes:
including Ash Prime, Vectis Prime and Carrier Prime. Plus, stock up on discounted Platinum and get Exclusive Gear available only through Prime Access!
Fixed Ash, Vectis and Carrier parts not dropping for players in the Void.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.2.0: Avalanche Offensive
patchlogs.fixes: Update 14.2.0: Avalanche Offensive Psa: The Launcher May Require You To Enter Your Windows Administrator Password To Update Your Firewall Rules.Avalanche Offensive Is On Until Monday @ 12 Noon Edt! Avalanche Offensivedefeat The Corpus Arctic Eximus!A Message From Cantis Of The Red Veil Resistance:Here'S What You'Ll Need To Dogo Forth And Take Down The Corpus Arctic Eximus, Tenno!Additions:Weapon Balance Changes:     • Grakata    • Castanas    • Ogris    • Torid    • Penta    • Lanka    • Vectis    • Vulkar    • Angstrum:    • Acrid:    • Attica:    • Spectra & Flux Rifle:    • Snipetron (+Vandal):    • Torid Changes:    • All Launchers:Key Hosting Improvements:Changes:Fixes:

patchlogs.name: Update 10.7.0
patchlogs.changes: Removed .25 second delay for auto reloading the Vectis.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.6.0: The Vectis!
patchlogs.additions: The Vectis is here! A classic Tenno sniper rifle, the Vectis is ideal for ranged takedowns!
